windsurf/swe-1.5.description: Flagship proprietary software engineering model. Optimized for agent workflows with improved reasoning and tool calling capabilities. Powers Cascade agents in Windsurf IDE.
windsurf/swe-1.5.notes: Available on Pro, Max, Teams, and Enterprise plans. Fixed cost per interaction, not token-based.

windsurf/swe-1.description: First-generation agentic coding model. Achieved Claude 3.5-level performance at a fraction of the cost. Powers core agentic features in Windsurf.
windsurf/swe-1.notes: Available on Pro, Max, Teams, and Enterprise plans. Fixed cost per interaction.

windsurf/swe-1-mini.description: Lightweight proprietary coding model. Powers passive suggestions in Windsurf Tab, optimized for real-time latency and autocomplete.
windsurf/swe-1-mini.notes: Available on all plans including Free. Unlimited usage on Free plan.

cascade.description: Multi-file autonomous coding agent for complex edits and project-wide changes. Available on all plans with varying usage quotas.

tab.description: AI-powered autocomplete with inline code suggestions. Unlimited on all plans.

chat.description: AI chat interface for coding assistance, debugging, and code generation.

inline-edit.description: Inline code editing and refinement within the editor.

fast-context.description: Fast context retrieval for efficient code understanding.

riptide-indexing.description: Advanced codebase indexing for improved context awareness.

terminal.description: AI agent capable of executing terminal commands.

background-agents.description: Agents that run autonomously in the background.

app-deploy.description: One-click application deployment. Free: limited per day. Pro: increased limits.

preview.description: Live preview of applications. Unlimited on all plans.

mcp.description: Model Context Protocol support for external integrations.

byok.description: Use your own API keys for supported third-party models.

teams.description: Team collaboration features, centralized billing, and admin controls.

enterprise.description: Enterprise-grade features including SSO, RBAC, SCIM, and priority support.

centralized-billing.description: Centralized billing and subscription management for organizations.

admin-dashboard.description: Administrative dashboard with usage analytics and team management.

sso.description: SAML Single Sign-On. Available on Enterprise plans.

rbac.description: Fine-grained role-based access control. Available on Enterprise plans.

scim.description: System for Cross-domain Identity Management for automated user provisioning. Available on Enterprise plans.

plans.notes: 25 prompt credits/month. Light daily and weekly quota. Unlimited Tab autocomplete. Unlimited previews. Basic models only.

500 prompt credits/month. Standard daily and weekly quota. Unlimited Tab autocomplete. Access to all premium models including SWE-1.5, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and GPT-5.4. Additional credits available for purchase.
Heavy daily and weekly quota. Unlimited Tab autocomplete. Significantly higher usage limits than Pro. Priority access to new models. Access to all premium models.
Discounted plan for verified students with .edu email address. Includes all Pro features at reduced price.
Per-user pricing. 500 prompt credits per user per month. Centralized billing and admin dashboard. Priority support. Additional pooled credits available.
Custom enterprise pricing. Includes SSO, RBAC, SCIM, hybrid deployment, volume discounts, dedicated account management, and custom SLAs. Longer context windows.

models.notes: Fixed cost per interaction. Consumes prompt credits based on task complexity. Not token-based.
Fixed cost per interaction. Consumes prompt credits. Not token-based.
Available on Free plan without consuming credits. Unlimited usage.

creditSystem.description: Windsurf uses a quota-based system with prompt credits. Each message to Cascade with a premium model consumes credits. Simple requests consume fewer credits than complex ones. Credits reset monthly and do not roll over.

additionalCredits.description: Pro users can purchase additional credits. Teams and Enterprise can purchase pooled credits. Pricing varies by plan.

autoReplenish.description: Automatic credit replenishment when balance runs low. Configured in plan settings.

freeModels.description: When credits are exhausted, users can still use free models in Write or Chat mode without consuming credits.

apiPricing.notes: Windsurf switched to a quota-based pricing model in March 2026. Pro users can purchase extra usage at API pricing when exceeding included quotas. Annual billing saves approximately 17-20%.

notes: Windsurf by Codeium (acquired by Cognition AI in 2025) offers an AI-powered IDE with plans: Free, Pro ($20/mo), Max ($200/mo), Student ($10/mo), Teams ($40/user/mo), and Enterprise (custom). The March 2026 pricing overhaul replaced credits with quotas. Pro includes 500 prompt credits/month, Max offers significantly higher limits, and Teams provides 500 credits/user/month. SWE-1.5 is the flagship proprietary model. Tab autocomplete is unlimited on all plans.
